args.subject: Action Item from Team Meeting - Coordinate with Development Team
args.body:
Hi David,

Following up on our team meeting on May 17, 2024, your assigned task is to coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase of the project.

The deadline for this task is May 20, 2024. Please ensure that the development team is aligned with the project requirements and that the initial phase is launched according to the timeline.

Let me know if you need any support or have any questions.

Best regards,
Emma Johnson
